description: VERIFIED LIVE: 中国大学MOOC (icourse163) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Course links use the /course/ path with the course name as link text. Navigate the tab to icourse163.org (a category, school, or search) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: course links — name + url extracted correctly. Scroll to load more.

tools.name: icourse163_courses
tools.description: Course links on the current 中国大学MOOC page (a category, school page, or search). Navigate the tab there and scroll to load more first. Returns each course's name and url (/course/<id>). VERIFIED.
